sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56248" key="kau=sos2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καῦσος</orth> (B), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n56248.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">καῦμα</ref> </xr> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:41" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Par.Ptol.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg022:81" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">81</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
